name: Pudding Juice
short_description: Manage your resources and your factory to produce enough pudding juice to satisfy the customers who will come each day.
detailed_description:
In "Pudding Juice," you take on the role of the owner of a pudding juice shop located in a distant land. To keep your shop running, you'll need to meet sales targets and build your reputation within the given timeframe. Manage your resources and organize your factory to produce enough pudding juice to satisfy your customers each day.

Game Details


"Pudding Juice" is a resource management and time management game where players must gather and manage various resources to complete missions within the allotted time. Use strategy and quick decision-making to accumulate points and progress through the levels.

  • A variety of levels with different challenges

  • Efficiently manage different resources

  • Complete missions within the specified time
  • Earn achievement rewards for excellent shop management
  • Level durations range from 15 to 90 minutes (depending on difficulty)
  • Approximately 10-20 hours to complete all levels

Get ready for an adventure in managing your very own pudding juice shop in "Pudding Juice," a game that challenges your planning and management skills!


Are you ready to embark on an adventure and manage your pudding juice shop?
